## 🚀 **Quick Commands**

### **Start Sanity Studio:**
```cmd
cd studio
npm run dev
```
Opens at: http://localhost:3333

### **Start Next.js Frontend:**
```cmd
npm run dev
```
Opens at: http://localhost:3000

### **Re-run Import Script:**
```cmd
cd studio
node scripts/import-complete-data.js
```
